entries.description: Restore RDS/Redshift explorer nodes and IAM/Secrets Manager database authentication in DataGrip and IntelliJ Ultimate ([#6395](https://github.com/aws/aws-toolkit-jetbrains/issues/6395))
Support for IDEs based on the 2025.1 and 2025.2 platforms is being deprecated and will be removed in an upcoming release. The minimum supported version will be 2025.3.
